description: Highlight a face region on a solid defined by 3 or more loc3d points. Points can be inline loc3d() calls or variable references to previously assigned loc3d points.
utility: Highlight a face region on a solid using loc3d points

arguments.name: point1
arguments.description: First vertex of the face region

arguments.name: point2
arguments.description: Second vertex of the face region

arguments.name: point3
arguments.description: Third vertex of the face region

examples.scenario: Highlight face with loc3d variable references
examples.expression:
C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
P1 = loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0, c(magenta))
P2 = loc3d(C, 0, 100, 0, c(magenta))
P3 = loc3d(C, 0, 100, 100, c(magenta))
F = solidface(C, P1, P2, P3, c(red), fo(0.3))
